response_body.message: ⚠️ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 민감한 정보가 포함된 요청은 외부 AI 서비스로 전송할 수 없습니다.

details.frontend_error_message: 이런... Duck.ai를 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하세요.

analysis.diagnostic_conclusion: JSON template RESOLVES ERR_RESPONSE_PARSING — confirms SSE format was the parsing problem, NOT H2 framing
analysis.error_change: ERR_RESPONSE_PARSING (#397,#400) → ERR_UNKNOWN (#403) — different error type proves SSE body format was the specific blocker
analysis.json_delivery: SUCCESSFUL — 200 OK JSON response received and parsed by browser without errors
analysis.cors_status: CORRECT — Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://duck.ai matches page origin
analysis.h2_framing: NO_ISSUE — H2 protocol handled JSON response without any protocol errors
analysis.remaining_issue: Frontend expects SSE (Accept: text/event-stream) but received JSON → ERR_UNKNOWN instead of ERR_RESPONSE_PARSING
analysis.root_cause_confirmed: SSE body format mismatch was causing ERR_RESPONSE_PARSING. JSON body is delivered correctly over H2.
analysis.next_steps: Need DuckDuckGo-specific SSE template that matches duck.ai frontend parser expectations. HAR capture of real duck.ai SSE stream needed for byte-level format comparison.

summary.result: KEY DIAGNOSTIC: JSON template eliminates ERR_RESPONSE_PARSING (proves SSE format was the problem, not H2). JSON response received correctly but frontend shows ERR_UNKNOWN because it expects SSE stream. Next: build correct SSE format matching duck.ai parser.
